rationale: The citing paper’s core constructs include reporting bias in sensitive surveys plus order-related behavioral effects (privacy-loss and response-mode inertia), which closely aligns with the cited paper’s experimental findings on sensitive disclosure being shaped by relative standards and question intrusiveness order. Even though the raw match provides only a DOI (no local citation context), the conceptual overlap suggests the cited work could be a mechanism/theory source rather than an incidental mention.
